name: Karlach & Shadowheart
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

Seems like you got caught peeping on Shadowheart and Karlach taking a dip in the pond.

As promised, The Duo Shadowheart and Karlach bot.
If you guys are still interested, I can do a series for the Major 6 Companions of BG3, all starting with how you meet them in the game. (After the Nautiloid Crash. I don't wanna have to write that.) It could be for my 2k and 3k special. *Just know, it'll take a bit longer to do, since my schedule has been fairly busy.*

Thank you for 3000 Followers, by the way.

By the way I'm writing Shadowheart to my best ability I still haven't finished like Act 2 of BG3.

jfc this bot is huge.

**EDIT:** It's almost 3 am for me what do you mean they added new tags??? I'll use them for upcoming bots + some older ones will get updated tags

(Art by BlueTheBone)
